name: calendarmcp
description: Hosted Google Calendar MCP server. Connect any AI agent to Google Calendar in 2 minutes. 10 tools including batch update, multi-account-one-key, and Google Advanced Protection support.
license: Proprietary (hosted service); MIT for this repository

auth.instructions: Sign in with Google at https://calendarmcp.ai to get your API key, then pass it as `Authorization: Bearer <key>`.

tools.name: list_events
tools.description: List events across one or all connected calendars in a time range.

tools.name: create_event
tools.description: Create an event with attendees, location, reminders, recurrence.

tools.name: update_event
tools.description: Partial update of an existing event.

tools.name: list_calendars
tools.description: List every calendar the key can see with per-calendar R/W permissions.

tools.name: find_free_time
tools.description: Free/busy query across one or more calendars.

tools.name: manage_attendees
tools.description: Add or remove attendees from an event.

tools.name: batch_update_events
tools.description: Update up to 50 events in one concurrent call.

examples.name: Find free time across all your calendars
examples.prompt: When am I free next Tuesday afternoon across all my calendars?

examples.name: Batch update events
examples.prompt: Rename all 'Standup' events from this month to 'Daily Standup'.

examples.name: Multi-account briefing
examples.prompt: What do I have across personal and work calendars next week?
